violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary when handling dirty dishes to clean dishes.

Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. A prep cooler containing potentially hazardous food maintained an internal temperature of 45- 50 F.

Food display and service. — --Potentially hazardous food was not kept at an internal temperature of 41F or below during display or service. A prep cooler containing potentially hazardous food maintained an internal temperature of 45- 50 F.
General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary when changing gloves.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Single use containers stored on the floor in the storage room.

Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Poisonous or toxic material was not stored in a manner to protect against contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items . Observed fly sprays stored above clean pans.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Hot holding and cold holding temperatures maintained, unwrapped food not reserved (5 pts deducted)
